name: talk-tight
install_doc:
# Claude Code (plugin + hooks):
claude plugin marketplace add williamrthomas/talk-tight
claude plugin install talk-tight@talk-tight

# Any agent (skills only, no hooks):
npx skills add williamrthomas/talk-tight

# Claude Code hooks only:
bash hooks/install.sh
notes: Prompt/skill compression protocol — targets AI OUTPUT, not tool output. Injects a system-prompt rule at session start (tight-activate.js SessionStart hook) instructing the model to use formal compressed prose (~70% fewer output tokens). Three compression levels: minimal/standard/max. Level changes tracked via UserPromptSubmit hook (tight-mode-tracker.js). Cache-BREAKING on session start (injects into system prompt). Does NOT compact tool call outputs or bash results — purely a prose style protocol. Multi-agent: Claude Code (hooks+plugin), Codex (plugin), Cursor/Copilot/Windsurf/Cline (skills via npx). Skill-based, zero binaries required.
claude_md: Formal compression protocol active. Zero filler. Every word earns its place. Level: standard.
